RULES AND REGULATIONS
CODE OF REGULATIONS
Welcome to the Rhode Island Code of Regulations

Please note: the RICR may have a slight delay in displaying the active Regulation after an Emergency Amendment expires at midnight. To view all versions of the specific Regulation, please see the History tab.
